scripts.dev: concurrently -n "BACKEND,FRONTEND" -c "bgBlue.bold,bgMagenta.bold" "npm run dev --prefix backend" "npm run dev --prefix frontend"
scripts.start: npx pm2 start dist/index.js --name "BotMaRe-Engine" --cwd backend && npx pm2 save
scripts.stop: npx pm2 stop all && npx pm2 delete all && npx pm2 save
